title: Senior Investment Banker at Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners
company: Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Join the Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners family as a Investment Banker in Mysuru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners:
Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners!
